requirement_topic.en: Korea EV Charging Connector Compatibility: Type 1 and CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 韩国电动汽车充电接口兼容性：Type 1 与 CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 韓國電動汽車充電接口相容性：Type 1 與 CCS1

summary.en: Korean EV charging infrastructure and vehicle inlets commonly use Type 1 for AC and CCS Combo 1 for DC fast charging. A Korea-bound EV charger should be designed and documented for Korea-market Type 1/CCS1 interoperability, including control pilot, locking, voltage/current rating, and communication assumptions. Korea does not use China's GB/T 20234 AC/DC connector set as the market connector baseline.
summary.zh: 韩国电动汽车充电基础设施和车辆接口通常采用交流 Type 1 与直流快充 CCS Combo 1。面向韩国的充电桩应围绕韩国市场 Type 1/CCS1 互操作性进行设计并形成文件，包括控制导引、锁止、电压/电流额定值及通信假设。韩国不以中国 GB/T 20234 交流/直流接口组作为市场接口基准。
summary.zht: 韓國電動汽車充電基礎設施和車輛接口通常採用交流 Type 1 與直流快充 CCS Combo 1。面向韓國的充電樁應圍繞韓國市場 Type 1/CCS1 互操作性進行設計並形成文件，包括控制導引、鎖止、電壓/電流額定值及通訊假設。韓國不以中國 GB/T 20234 交流/直流接口組作為市場接口基準。

standards_or_laws: Korean EV charging connector practice: Type 1 AC and CCS Combo 1 DC
IEC 62196 family as adopted or referenced in Korean standards and procurement practice
Korea-market Ministry of Environment/KECO public charging interoperability requirements

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging and GB/T 20234.3 for DC charging. These connectors are physically and electrically distinct from Type 1 and CCS1. GB/T 27930 CAN-based DC communication is also different from common CCS communication pathways.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电采用 GB/T 20234.2，直流充电采用 GB/T 20234.3。上述接口与 Type 1 和 CCS1 在物理和电气方面均不同。GB/T 27930 的直流 CAN 通信也不同于常见 CCS 通信路径。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電採用 GB/T 20234.2，直流充電採用 GB/T 20234.3。上述接口與 Type 1 和 CCS1 在物理和電氣方面均不同。GB/T 27930 的直流 CAN 通訊也不同於常見 CCS 通訊路徑。

gap.en: A charger with only GB/T 20234 connectors is not Korea-ready. Hardware redesign is normally required for Type 1/CCS1 cable assemblies or sockets, insulation and temperature sensing assumptions, locking/interface logic, and DC communication stack compatibility. This is a physical interoperability gap, not a translation or label-only gap.
gap.zh: 仅配备 GB/T 20234 接口的充电桩不能直接适配韩国。通常需要围绕 Type 1/CCS1 枪线或插座、绝缘和温度检测假设、锁止/接口逻辑以及直流通信协议栈兼容性进行硬件重新设计。这是物理互操作差距，并非翻译或标签差距。
gap.zht: 僅配備 GB/T 20234 接口的充電樁不能直接適配韓國。通常需要圍繞 Type 1/CCS1 槍線或插座、絕緣和溫度檢測假設、鎖止/接口邏輯以及直流通訊協議棧相容性進行硬體重新設計。這是物理互操作差距，並非翻譯或標籤差距。

mandatory_status.target: Practical market and public-infrastructure requirement for interoperability; verify exact mandatory procurement or subsidy conditions for each Korean deployment.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically for China-market connector compatibility; not accepted as a Korean connector substitute.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Korea-market EV chargers should support Type 1 AC and/or CCS1 DC as applicable. GB/T 20234 AC/DC connector-only products are not a substitute for Korea connector compatibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 韩国市场电动汽车充电桩应按适用场景支持 Type 1 交流和/或 CCS1 直流。仅支持 GB/T 20234 交流/直流接口的产品不能替代韩国接口兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 韓國市場電動汽車充電樁應按適用場景支援 Type 1 交流和/或 CCS1 直流。僅支援 GB/T 20234 交流/直流接口的產品不能取代韓國接口相容性。
